mapper.select: SELECT m.menu_oid, m.menu_nm, m.menu_page, m.menu_cd, m.menu_url, m.up_menu_oid, m.menu_lv, m.menu_auth_lv, m.menu_seq, m.menu_type, m.bbs_use_yn, m.prvc_use_yn, m.use_yn, m.icon_nm, m.menu_expln FROM ${schema}.menu m INNER JOIN ${schema}.user_menu_authrt uma ON m.menu_oid = uma.menu_oid WHERE uma.user_oid = #{userOid} AND m.use_yn = 'Y' AND uma.use_yn = 'Y' AND m.menu_type != 'HIDDEN' AND uma.auth_bgng_dt <= CURDATE() AND uma.auth_end_dt >= CURDATE()

SELECT user_menu_authrt_oid, user_oid, menu_oid, inq_authrt_yn, wrt_authrt_yn, del_authrt_yn, excel_authrt_yn, otpt_authrt_yn, auth_bgng_dt, auth_end_dt, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.user_menu_authrt WHERE user_oid = #{userOid} AND menu_oid = #{menuOid} AND use_yn = 'Y' AND auth_bgng_dt <= #{now} AND auth_end_dt >= #{now}

SELECT menu_oid, menu_nm, menu_page, menu_cd, menu_url, up_menu_oid, menu_lv, menu_seq, menu_type, menu_auth_lv, bbs_use_yn, prvc_use_yn, expsr_yn, use_yn, icon_nm, menu_expln, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.menu WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND menu_cd = #{menuCd}
